title: Induction on EML Depth — Can We Step Up Codimension?

analysis.object: T736: Induction on EML Depth — Can We Step Up Codimension? depth analysis

inductive_hypothesis.description: Assume surjectivity at codimension p; prove at codimension p+1

depth_increase_with_codim.description: Does EML depth increase with codimension?

step_up_mechanism.description: From codim p to p+1: need Lefschetz-type sequence one level up
step_up_mechanism.reason: No known such sequence for p > 1

gysin_map.description: Gysin map: H^*(Y) -> H^{*+2}(X) for subvariety Y in X

gysin_surjectivity.description: If Gysin is surjective, induction works
gysin_surjectivity.reason: Gysin surjectivity = equivalent to Hodge for hypersurfaces

induction_block.description: Gysin surjectivity unknown for general p -- induction blocked at step 2
induction_block.reason: T736: induction fails at first step due to Gysin obstruction

analysis.theorem: T736: Induction on EML Depth — Can We Step Up Codimension? (S1015).

key_theorem: T736: Induction on EML Depth — Can We Step Up Codimension? (S1015).
